import React, { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
import * as THREE from 'three';

// ULTRA SHARP 4K world map texture - optimized for zoom
const WORLD_MAP_TEXTURE = 'data:image/png;base64,';

export default function WorldMapExplorer() {
  const containerRef = useRef(null);
  const sceneRef = useRef(null);
  const cameraRef = useRef(null);
  const rendererRef = useRef(null);
  const globeRef = useRef(null);
  const markersRef = useRef([]);
  const connectionLinesRef = useRef([]);
  const animationFrameRef = useRef(null);
  const [selectedCountry, setSelectedCountry] = useState(null);
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [hoveredCountry, setHoveredCountry] = useState(null);
  const [textureLoaded, setTextureLoaded] = useState(false);
  const [showConnections, setShowConnections] = useState(true);

  const countries = [
    { name: 'United States', lat: 37.0902, lon: -95.7129, capital: 'Washington D.C.', connections: ['United Kingdom', 'Japan', 'Brazil'] },
    { name: 'Canada', lat: 56.1304, lon: -106.3468, capital: 'Ottawa', connections: ['United States', 'United Kingdom'] },
    { name: 'Mexico', lat: 23.6345, lon: -102.5528, capital: 'Mexico City', connections: ['United States', 'Brazil'] },
    { name: 'Brazil', lat: -14.2350, lon: -51.9253, capital: 'Brasília', connections: ['United States', 'Portugal', 'Argentina'] },
    { name: 'Argentina', lat: -38.4161, lon: -63.6167, capital: 'Buenos Aires', connections: ['Brazil', 'Chile'] },
    { name: 'Chile', lat: -35.6751, lon: -71.5430, capital: 'Santiago', connections: ['Argentina', 'Australia'] },
    { name: 'Peru', lat: -9.1900, lon: -75.0152, capital: 'Lima', connections: ['Brazil', 'Colombia'] },
    { name: 'Colombia', lat: 4.5709, lon: -74.2973, capital: 'Bogotá', connections: ['Peru', 'Venezuela'] },
    { name: 'Venezuela', lat: 6.4238, lon: -66.5897, capital: 'Caracas', connections: ['Colombia', 'Brazil'] },
    { name: 'United Kingdom', lat: 55.3781, lon: -3.4360, capital: 'London', connections: ['United States', 'France', 'Germany', 'Norway'] },
    { name: 'France', lat: 46.2276, lon: 2.2137, capital: 'Paris', connections: ['United Kingdom', 'Germany', 'Spain', 'Italy'] },
    { name: 'Germany', lat: 51.1657, lon: 10.4515, capital: 'Berlin', connections: ['United Kingdom', 'France', 'Poland', 'Netherlands'] },
    { name: 'Italy', lat: 41.8719, lon: 12.5674, capital: 'Rome', connections: ['France', 'Greece', 'Egypt'] },
    { name: 'Spain', lat: 40.4637, lon: -3.7492, capital: 'Madrid', connections: ['France', 'Portugal', 'Morocco'] },
    { name: 'Portugal', lat: 39.3999, lon: -8.2245, capital: 'Lisbon', connections: ['Spain', 'Brazil'] },
    { name: 'Netherlands', lat: 52.1326, lon: 5.2913, capital: 'Amsterdam', connections: ['Germany', 'United Kingdom', 'Belgium'] },
    { name: 'Belgium', lat: 50.5039, lon: 4.4699, capital: 'Brussels', connections: ['Netherlands', 'France', 'Germany'] },
    { name: 'Switzerland', lat: 46.8182, lon: 8.2275, capital: 'Bern', connections: ['Germany', 'France', 'Italy'] },
    { name: 'Austria', lat: 47.5162, lon: 14.5501, capital: 'Vienna', connections: ['Germany', 'Switzerland'] },
    { name: 'Poland', lat: 51.9194, lon: 19.1451, capital: 'Warsaw', connections: ['Germany', 'Ukraine'] },
    { name: 'Ukraine', lat: 48.3794, lon: 31.1656, capital: 'Kyiv', connections: ['Poland', 'Russia', 'Turkey'] },
    { name: 'Greece', lat: 39.0742, lon: 21.8243, capital: 'Athens', connections: ['Italy', 'Turkey', 'Egypt'] },
    { name: 'Norway', lat: 60.4720, lon: 8.4689, capital: 'Oslo', connections: ['United Kingdom', 'Sweden'] },
    { name: 'Sweden', lat: 60.1282, lon: 18.6435, capital: 'Stockholm', connections: ['Norway', 'Finland', 'Denmark'] },
    { name: 'Denmark', lat: 56.2639, lon: 9.5018, capital: 'Copenhagen', connections: ['Sweden', 'Germany'] },
    { name: 'Finland', lat: 61.9241, lon: 25.7482, capital: 'Helsinki', connections: ['Sweden', 'Russia'] },
    { name: 'Russia', lat: 61.5240, lon: 105.3188, capital: 'Moscow', connections: ['Finland', 'China', 'Ukraine'] },
    { name: 'China', lat: 35.8617, lon: 104.1954, capital: 'Beijing', connections: ['Russia', 'Japan', 'India', 'Singapore'] },
    { name: 'Japan', lat: 36.2048, lon: 138.2529, capital: 'Tokyo', connections: ['China', 'South Korea', 'United States', 'Australia'] },
    { name: 'South Korea', lat: 35.9078, lon: 127.7669, capital: 'Seoul', connections: ['Japan', 'China'] },
    { name: 'North Korea', lat: 40.3399, lon: 127.5101, capital: 'Pyongyang', connections: ['China', 'Russia'] },
    { name: 'India', lat: 20.5937, lon: 78.9629, capital: 'New Delhi', connections: ['China', 'Pakistan', 'Singapore', 'United Arab Emirates'] },
    { name: 'Pakistan', lat: 30.3753, lon: 69.3451, capital: 'Islamabad', connections: ['India', 'China', 'Iran'] },
    { name: 'Bangladesh', lat: 23.6850, lon: 90.3563, capital: 'Dhaka', connections: ['India', 'Thailand'] },
    { name: 'Thailand', lat: 15.8700, lon: 100.9925, capital: 'Bangkok', connections: ['Bangladesh', 'Singapore', 'Vietnam'] },
    { name: 'Vietnam', lat: 14.0583, lon: 108.2772, capital: 'Hanoi', connections: ['Thailand', 'China'] },
    { name: 'Indonesia', lat: -0.7893, lon: 113.9213, capital: 'Jakarta', connections: ['Singapore', 'Australia'] },
    { name: 'Malaysia', lat: 4.2105, lon: 101.9758, capital: 'Kuala Lumpur', connections: ['Singapore', 'Thailand'] },
    { name: 'Singapore', lat: 1.3521, lon: 103.8198, capital: 'Singapore', connections: ['Malaysia', 'Indonesia', 'India', 'China', 'Australia'] },
    { name: 'Philippines', lat: 12.8797, lon: 121.7740, capital: 'Manila', connections: ['China', 'Japan'] },
    { name: 'Australia', lat: -25.2744, lon: 133.7751, capital: 'Canberra', connections: ['Singapore', 'Japan', 'Chile', 'New Zealand'] },
    { name: 'New Zealand', lat: -40.9006, lon: 174.8860, capital: 'Wellington', connections: ['Australia'] },
    { name: 'South Africa', lat: -30.5595, lon: 22.9375, capital: 'Pretoria', connections: ['Brazil', 'Egypt', 'Kenya'] },
    { name: 'Egypt', lat: 26.8206, lon: 30.8025, capital: 'Cairo', connections: ['Greece', 'Italy', 'Saudi Arabia', 'South Africa'] },
    { name: 'Kenya', lat: -0.0236, lon: 37.9062, capital: 'Nairobi', connections: ['South Africa', 'Egypt'] },
    { name: 'Nigeria', lat: 9.0820, lon: 8.6753, capital: 'Abuja', connections: ['Morocco', 'South Africa'] },
    { name: 'Morocco', lat: 31.7917, lon: -7.0926, capital: 'Rabat', connections: ['Spain', 'Nigeria'] },
    { name: 'Turkey', lat: 38.9637, lon: 35.2433, capital: 'Ankara', connections: ['Greece', 'Ukraine', 'Iran', 'Saudi Arabia'] },
    { name: 'Saudi Arabia', lat: 23.8859, lon: 45.0792, capital: 'Riyadh', connections: ['Egypt', 'Turkey', 'United Arab Emirates'] },
    { name: 'United Arab Emirates', lat: 23.4241, lon: 53.8478, capital: 'Abu Dhabi', connections: ['Saudi Arabia', 'India'] },
    { name: 'Israel', lat: 31.0461, lon: 34.8516, capital: 'Jerusalem', connections: ['Egypt', 'Turkey'] },
    { name: 'Iran', lat: 32.4279, lon: 53.6880, capital: 'Tehran', connections: ['Turkey', 'Pakistan'] },
    { name: 'Iraq', lat: 33.2232, lon: 43.6793, capital: 'Baghdad', connections: ['Iran', 'Turkey', 'Saudi Arabia'] },
    { name: 'Afghanistan', lat: 33.9391, lon: 67.7100, capital: 'Kabul', connections: ['Pakistan', 'Iran'] },
  ];
  const filteredCountries = countries.filter(country =>
    country.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
  );

  const latLonToVector3 = (lat, lon, radius) => {
    const phi = (90 - lat) * (Math.PI / 180);
    const theta = (lon + 180) * (Math.PI / 180);
    return new THREE.Vector3(
      -radius * Math.sin(phi) * Math.cos(theta),
      radius * Math.cos(phi),
      radius * Math.sin(phi) * Math.sin(theta)
    );
  };

  const createConnectionLines = (scene) => {
    if (!showConnections) return;

    connectionLinesRef.current.forEach(line => scene.remove(line));
    connectionLinesRef.current = [];

    const processedPairs = new Set();

    countries.forEach(country => {
      if (!country.connections) return;

      country.connections.forEach(connectedCountryName => {
        const connectedCountry = countries.find(c => c.name === connectedCountryName);
        if (!connectedCountry) return;

        const pairKey = [country.name, connectedCountryName].sort().join('|');
        if (processedPairs.has(pairKey)) return;
        processedPairs.add(pairKey);

        const start = latLonToVector3(country.lat, country.lon, 1.51);
        const end = latLonToVector3(connectedCountry.lat, connectedCountry.lon, 1.51);

        const midPoint = new THREE.Vector3()
          .addVectors(start, end)
          .multiplyScalar(0.5)
          .normalize()
          .multiplyScalar(1.65);

        const curve = new THREE.QuadraticBezierCurve3(start, midPoint, end);
        const points = curve.getPoints(50);
        const geometry = new THREE.BufferGeometry().setFromPoints(points);
        
        const material = new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({
          color: 0x00d9ff,
          transparent: true,
          opacity: 0.35,
        });

        const line = new THREE.Line(geometry, material);
        scene.add(line);
        connectionLinesRef.current.push(line);
      });
    });
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!containerRef.current) return;

    const scene = new THREE.Scene();
    sceneRef.current = scene;

    const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(
      50,
      containerRef.current.clientWidth / containerRef.current.clientHeight,
      0.1,
      1000
    );
    camera.position.set(0, 0, 5);
    cameraRef.current = camera;

    const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ 
      antialias: true, 
      alpha: true,
      powerPreference: 'high-performance'
    });
    renderer.setSize(containerRef.current.clientWidth, containerRef.current.clientHeight);
    renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 2));
    containerRef.current.appendChild(renderer.domElement);
    rendererRef.current = renderer;

    // Load ULTRA SHARP texture with anti-pixelation settings
    const textureLoader = new THREE.TextureLoader();
    textureLoader.load(
      WORLD_MAP_TEXTURE,
      (texture) => {
        console.log('✓ ULTRA SHARP 4K texture loaded!');
        
        // CRITICAL ANTI-PIXELATION SETTINGS
        texture.wrapS = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
        texture.wrapT = THREE.ClampToEdgeWrapping;
        
        // BEST QUALITY FILTERS - prevents pixelation when zoomed
        texture.minFilter = THREE.LinearMipmapLinearFilter; // Best for zooming out
        texture.magFilter = THREE.LinearFilter; // CRITICAL: Smooth interpolation when zooming in
        
        // MAXIMUM ANISOTROPIC FILTERING - keeps texture sharp at all angles
        const maxAnisotropy = renderer.capabilities.getMaxAnisotropy();
        texture.anisotropy = maxAnisotropy; // Usually 16x
        console.log(`Anisotropic filtering: ${maxAnisotropy}x`);
        
        // Generate mipmaps for smooth transitions
        texture.generateMipmaps = true;
        texture.needsUpdate = true;
        
        // ULTRA HIGH-RES SPHERE - 512 segments for maximum smoothness
        const geometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.5, 512, 512);
        console.log('Sphere geometry: 512x512 segments');
        
        // Material optimized for sharp rendering
        const material = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({
          map: texture,
          bumpMap: texture,
          bumpScale: 0.002,
          specular: 0x1a4a6a,
          shininess: 25,
          emissive: 0x001122,
          emissiveIntensity: 0.12,
        });
        
        const globe = new THREE.Mesh(geometry, material);
        globe.rotation.y = Math.PI;
        scene.add(globe);
        globeRef.current = globe;
        
        createConnectionLines(scene);
        setTextureLoaded(true);
      },
      (xhr) => {
        const percent = (xhr.loaded / xhr.total * 100).toFixed(0);
        console.log(`Loading 4K texture: ${percent}%`);
      },
      (error) => {
        console.error('✗ Texture load error:', error);
        // Fallback
        const geometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.5, 512, 512);
        const material = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({
          color: 0x1a3a5a,
          emissive: 0x001122,
        });
        const globe = new THREE.Mesh(geometry, material);
        scene.add(globe);
        globeRef.current = globe;
        setTextureLoaded(true);
      }
    );

    // Atmosphere
    const atmosphereGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.58, 128, 128);
    const atmosphereMaterial = new THREE.ShaderMaterial({
      vertexShader: `
        varying vec3 vNormal;
        void main() {
          vNormal = normalize(normalMatrix * normal);
          gl_Position = projectionMatrix * modelViewMatrix * vec4(position, 1.0);
        }
      `,
      fragmentShader: `
        varying vec3 vNormal;
        void main() {
          float intensity = pow(0.6 - dot(vNormal, vec3(0, 0, 1.0)), 2.0);
          gl_FragColor = vec4(0.0, 0.85, 1.0, 1.0) * intensity;
        }
      `,
      blending: THREE.AdditiveBlending,
      side: THREE.BackSide,
      transparent: true,
    });
    const atmosphere = new THREE.Mesh(atmosphereGeometry, atmosphereMaterial);
    scene.add(atmosphere);

    // Country markers - high quality
    const markerGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.015, 32, 32);
    const markerMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
      color: 0x00d9ff,
      transparent: true,
      opacity: 0.9,
    });

    countries.forEach(country => {
      const markerMesh = new THREE.Mesh(markerGeometry, markerMaterial.clone());
      const position = latLonToVector3(country.lat, country.lon, 1.52);
      markerMesh.position.copy(position);
      markerMesh.userData = { country };
      scene.add(markerMesh);
      markersRef.current.push(markerMesh);

      const pulseGeometry = new THREE.RingGeometry(0.018, 0.022, 64);
      const pulseMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
        color: 0x00d9ff,
        transparent: true,
        opacity: 0.5,
        side: THREE.DoubleSide,
      });
      const pulseMesh = new THREE.Mesh(pulseGeometry, pulseMaterial);
      
      const direction = position.clone().normalize();
      pulseMesh.lookAt(direction.multiplyScalar(10));
      pulseMesh.position.copy(position);
      pulseMesh.userData = { isPulse: true, scale: 1 };
      scene.add(pulseMesh);
      markersRef.current.push(pulseMesh);
    });

    // Enhanced lighting
    const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 1.4);
    scene.add(ambientLight);

    const sunLight = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffffff, 2.2);
    sunLight.position.set(5, 3, 5);
    scene.add(sunLight);

    const fillLight = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0x00d9ff, 0.5);
    fillLight.position.set(-5, -1, -3);
    scene.add(fillLight);

    const backLight = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0x4488aa, 0.7);
    backLight.position.set(0, 0, -5);
    scene.add(backLight);

    // Starfield
    const starsGeometry = new THREE.BufferGeometry();
    const starsMaterial = new THREE.PointsMaterial({
      color: 0x88ccff,
      size: 0.012,
      transparent: true,
      opacity: 0.8,
    });

    const starsVertices = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < 15000; i++) {
      const x = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2000;
      const y = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2000;
      const z = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2000;
      starsVertices.push(x, y, z);
    }

    starsGeometry.setAttribute('position', new THREE.Float32BufferAttribute(starsVertices, 3));
    const stars = new THREE.Points(starsGeometry, starsMaterial);
    scene.add(stars);

    // Mouse interaction
    const raycaster = new THREE.Raycaster();
    const mouse = new THREE.Vector2();

    let isDragging = false;
    let previousMousePosition = { x: 0, y: 0 };
    let rotation = { x: 0.3, y: 0 };
    let targetRotation = { x: 0.3, y: 0 };
    let autoRotate = true;

    const onMouseDown = (e) => {
      isDragging = true;
      autoRotate = false;
      previousMousePosition = { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY };
    };

    const onMouseMove = (e) => {
      const rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect();
      mouse.x = ((e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 2 - 1;
      mouse.y = -((e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height) * 2 + 1;

      if (isDragging) {
        const deltaX = e.clientX - previousMousePosition.x;
        const deltaY = e.clientY - previousMousePosition.y;
        
        targetRotation.y += deltaX * 0.005;
        targetRotation.x += deltaY * 0.005;
        targetRotation.x = Math.max(-Math.PI / 2, Math.min(Math.PI / 2, targetRotation.x));
        
        previousMousePosition = { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY };
      } else {
        raycaster.setFromCamera(mouse, camera);
        const intersects = raycaster.intersectObjects(markersRef.current);
        
        if (intersects.length > 0 && intersects[0].object.userData.country) {
          setHoveredCountry(intersects[0].object.userData.country);
          document.body.style.cursor = 'pointer';
        } else {
          setHoveredCountry(null);
          document.body.style.cursor = 'default';
        }
      }
    };

    const onMouseUp = () => {
      isDragging = false;
    };

    const onClick = (e) => {
      const rect = renderer.domElement.getBoundingClientRect();
      mouse.x = ((e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 2 - 1;
      mouse.y = -((e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height) * 2 + 1;

      raycaster.setFromCamera(mouse, camera);
      const intersects = raycaster.intersectObjects(markersRef.current);
      
      if (intersects.length > 0 && intersects[0].object.userData.country) {
        zoomToCountry(intersects[0].object.userData.country);
      }
    };

    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('mousedown', onMouseDown);
    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('mouseup', onMouseUp);
    renderer.domElement.addEventListener('click', onClick);

    // Animation loop
    const animate = () => {
      animationFrameRef.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate);
      
      if (autoRotate && !isDragging && globeRef.current) {
        targetRotation.y += 0.0005;
      }
      
      rotation.x += (targetRotation.x - rotation.x) * 0.1;
      rotation.y += (targetRotation.y - rotation.y) * 0.1;
      
      if (globeRef.current) {
        globeRef.current.rotation.x = rotation.x;
        globeRef.current.rotation.y = rotation.y + Math.PI;
      }
      
      atmosphere.rotation.x = rotation.x;
      atmosphere.rotation.y = rotation.y;
      
      connectionLinesRef.current.forEach((line, index) => {
        const opacity = 0.2 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.001 + index * 0.5) * 0.15;
        line.material.opacity = opacity;
      });
      
      markersRef.current.forEach(marker => {
        if (marker.userData.isPulse) {
          marker.userData.scale += 0.012;
          if (marker.userData.scale > 2) marker.userData.scale = 1;
          const scale = marker.userData.scale;
          marker.scale.set(scale, scale, scale);
          marker.material.opacity = 0.5 / scale;
        }
      });
      
      stars.rotation.y += 0.00005;
      
      renderer.render(scene, camera);
    };
    animate();

    const handleResize = () => {
      if (!containerRef.current) return;
      camera.aspect = containerRef.current.clientWidth / containerRef.current.clientHeight;
      camera.updateProjectionMatrix();
      renderer.setSize(containerRef.current.clientWidth, containerRef.current.clientHeight);
    };
    window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize);

    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize);
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('mousedown', onMouseDown);
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove);
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('mouseup', onMouseUp);
      renderer.domElement.removeEventListener('click', onClick);
      if (animationFrameRef.current) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrameRef.current);
      }
      if (containerRef.current && renderer.domElement && containerRef.current.contains(renderer.domElement)) {
        containerRef.current.removeChild(renderer.domElement);
      }
      renderer.dispose();
    };
  }, [showConnections]);

  const zoomToCountry = (country) => {
    setSelectedCountry(country);
    
    if (!cameraRef.current || !globeRef.current) return;

    const targetPosition = latLonToVector3(country.lat, country.lon, 2.2);
    
    const startPosition = cameraRef.current.position.clone();
    const startTime = Date.now();
    const duration = 2000;

    const animateCamera = () => {
      const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
      const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
      const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 4);

      cameraRef.current.position.lerpVectors(startPosition, targetPosition, eased);
      cameraRef.current.lookAt(0, 0, 0);

      if (progress < 1) {
        requestAnimationFrame(animateCamera);
      }
    };
    animateCamera();

    const targetRotation = {
      y: -(country.lon * Math.PI) / 180 + Math.PI,
      x: (country.lat * Math.PI) / 180 * 0.5,
    };

    const startRotation = {
      x: globeRef.current.rotation.x,
      y: globeRef.current.rotation.y,
    };

    const animateGlobe = () => {
      const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
      const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
      const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 4);

      globeRef.current.rotation.y = startRotation.y + (targetRotation.y - startRotation.y) * eased;
      globeRef.current.rotation.x = startRotation.x + (targetRotation.x - startRotation.x) * eased;

      if (progress < 1) {
        requestAnimationFrame(animateGlobe);
      }
    };
    animateGlobe();
  };

  const resetView = () => {
    setSelectedCountry(null);
    
    if (!cameraRef.current) return;

    const startPosition = cameraRef.current.position.clone();
    const targetPosition = new THREE.Vector3(0, 0, 5);
    const startTime = Date.now();
    const duration = 2000;

    const animateCamera = () => {
      const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
      const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
      const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 4);

      cameraRef.current.position.lerpVectors(startPosition, targetPosition, eased);
      cameraRef.current.lookAt(0, 0, 0);

      if (progress < 1) {
        requestAnimationFrame(animateCamera);
      }
    };
    animateCamera();
  };

  return (
    <div style={{
      width: '100%',
      height: '100vh',
      background: 'radial-gradient(ellipse at center, #0a1929 0%, #000000 100%)',
      fontFamily: '"IBM Plex Mono", "Courier New", monospace',
      color: '#00d9ff',
      overflow: 'hidden',
      position: 'relative',
    }}>
      {!textureLoaded && (
        <div style={{
          position: 'absolute',
          top: '50%',
          left: '50%',
          transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%)',
          fontSize: '16px',
          color: '#00d9ff',
          zIndex: 100,
          textAlign: 'center',
        }}>
          <div style={{ 
            marginBottom: '12px',
            fontSize: '28px',
            animation: 'spin 1s linear infinite',
          }}>
            🌐
          </div>
          LOADING 4K TEXTURE...
        </div>
      )}

      <div style={{
        position: 'absolute',
        top: 0,
        left: 0,
        right: 0,
        bottom: 0,
        background: 'radial-gradient(circle at 30% 50%, rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.05) 0%, transparent 50%)',
        animation: 'pulse 6s ease-in-out infinite',
        pointerEvents: 'none',
      }} />

      <div style={{
        position: 'absolute',
        top: 0,
        left: 0,
        right: 0,
        padding: '24px 36px',
        background: 'linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(10, 25, 41, 0.95) 0%, rgba(10, 25, 41, 0) 100%)',
        backdropFilter: 'blur(10px)',
        zIndex: 10,
        borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.2)',
      }}>
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'space-between' }}>
          <div>
            <h1 style={{
              margin: 0,
              fontSize: '32px',
              fontWeight: '700',
              letterSpacing: '0.1em',
              color: '#00d9ff',
              textShadow: '0 0 20px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.6)',
            }}>
              GLOBAL NETWORK MAP • 4K
            </h1>
            <p style={{
              margin: '6px 0 0 0',
              fontSize: '10px',
              color: '#66a3bb',
              letterSpacing: '0.15em',
              textTransform: 'uppercase',
            }}>
              {countries.length} NODES • ULTRA SHARP RENDERING
            </p>
          </div>
          
          {selectedCountry && (
            <div style={{
              padding: '12px 20px',
              background: 'rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.1)',
              border: '1px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.4)',
              borderRadius: '4px',
              backdropFilter: 'blur(10px)',
            }}>
              <div style={{ fontSize: '10px', color: '#66a3bb', marginBottom: '4px', letterSpacing: '0.1em' }}>
                CONNECTED NODE
              </div>
              <div style={{ fontSize: '16px', fontWeight: '700', color: '#00d9ff', letterSpacing: '0.05em' }}>
                {selectedCountry.name.toUpperCase()}
              </div>
              <div style={{ fontSize: '11px', color: '#88ccff', marginTop: '2px' }}>
                {selectedCountry.capital}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        <button
          onClick={() => setShowConnections(!showConnections)}
          style={{
            position: 'absolute',
            top: '24px',
            right: '400px',
            padding: '10px 16px',
            background: showConnections ? 'rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.2)' : 'rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.05)',
            border: '1px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.4)',
            borderRadius: '4px',
            color: '#00d9ff',
            fontSize: '11px',
            fontWeight: '600',
            cursor: 'pointer',
            fontFamily: 'inherit',
            letterSpacing: '0.05em',
            transition: 'all 0.3s ease',
          }}
        >
          {showConnections ? '◉ CABLES ON' : '○ CABLES OFF'}
        </button>
      </div>

      <div ref={containerRef} style={{ width: '100%', height: '100%' }} />

      {hoveredCountry && (
        <div style={{
          position: 'fixed',
          bottom: '100px',
          left: '50%',
          transform: 'translateX(-50%)',
          padding: '10px 18px',
          background: 'rgba(10, 25, 41, 0.95)',
          border: '1px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.6)',
          borderRadius: '2px',
          backdropFilter: 'blur(20px)',
          fontSize: '13px',
          fontWeight: '600',
          color: '#00d9ff',
          pointerEvents: 'none',
          zIndex: 30,
          animation: 'fadeInUp 0.3s ease',
          boxShadow: '0 0 30px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.3)',
          letterSpacing: '0.05em',
        }}>
          ▸ {hoveredCountry.name.toUpperCase()}
        </div>
      )}

      <div style={{
        position: 'absolute',
        right: '24px',
        top: '50%',
        transform: 'translateY(-50%)',
        width: '340px',
        maxHeight: '75vh',
        background: 'rgba(10, 25, 41, 0.92)',
        backdropFilter: 'blur(30px)',
        border: '1px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.3)',
        padding: '24px',
        boxShadow: '0 0 40px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.2)',
        zIndex: 20,
        display: 'flex',
        flexDirection: 'column',
      }}>
        <h2 style={{
          margin: '0 0 18px 0',
          fontSize: '14px',
          fontWeight: '700',
          color: '#00d9ff',
          letterSpacing: '0.1em',
          textTransform: 'uppercase',
          borderBottom: '1px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.3)',
          paddingBottom: '12px',
        }}>
          ▸ NODE DIRECTORY
        </h2>

        <input
          type="text"
          placeholder="SEARCH..."
          value={searchQuery}
          onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
          style={{
            width: '100%',
            padding: '12px 14px',
            background: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)',
            border: '1px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.3)',
            color: '#00d9ff',
            fontSize: '12px',
            outline: 'none',
            marginBottom: '18px',
            fontFamily: 'inherit',
            letterSpacing: '0.05em',
          }}
        />

        <div style={{
          flex: 1,
          overflowY: 'auto',
          marginBottom: '18px',
          paddingRight: '8px',
        }}>
          {filteredCountries.map((country, index) => (
            <button
              key={country.name}
              onClick={() => zoomToCountry(country)}
              style={{
                width: '100%',
                padding: '14px 16px',
                marginBottom: '8px',
                background: selectedCountry?.name === country.name 
                  ? 'rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.2)'
                  : 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)',
                border: selectedCountry?.name === country.name
                  ? '1px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.7)'
                  : '1px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.2)',
                color: '#00d9ff',
                fontSize: '12px',
                textAlign: 'left',
                cursor: 'pointer',
                transition: 'all 0.2s ease',
                fontFamily: 'inherit',
                fontWeight: selectedCountry?.name === country.name ? '700' : '500',
                letterSpacing: '0.05em',
              }}
            >
              <div style={{ fontWeight: '600', marginBottom: '4px' }}>
                ▸ {country.name.toUpperCase()}
              </div>
              <div style={{ fontSize: '10px', color: '#66a3bb', fontWeight: '400' }}>
                {country.capital} • {country.connections?.length || 0} links
              </div>
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        <button
          onClick={resetView}
          disabled={!selectedCountry}
          style={{
            width: '100%',
            padding: '14px',
            background: selectedCountry 
              ? 'rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.2)'
              : 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)',
            border: '1px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.4)',
            color: selectedCountry ? '#00d9ff' : '#446677',
            fontSize: '12px',
            fontWeight: '700',
            cursor: selectedCountry ? 'pointer' : 'not-allowed',
            fontFamily: 'inherit',
            letterSpacing: '0.1em',
          }}
        >
          ⟲ RESET VIEW
        </button>
      </div>

      <div style={{
        position: 'absolute',
        bottom: '24px',
        left: '24px',
        padding: '16px 20px',
        background: 'rgba(10, 25, 41, 0.92)',
        backdropFilter: 'blur(30px)',
        border: '1px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.3)',
        fontSize: '11px',
        color: '#66a3bb',
        zIndex: 10,
        maxWidth: '300px',
      }}>
        <div style={{ 
          marginBottom: '10px', 
          color: '#00d9ff', 
          fontWeight: '700',
          fontSize: '12px',
          letterSpacing: '0.1em',
        }}>
          ▸ CONTROLS
        </div>
        <div style={{ lineHeight: '1.8', letterSpacing: '0.03em' }}>
          <div>• <strong style={{ color: '#88ccff' }}>DRAG</strong> Rotate globe</div>
          <div>• <strong style={{ color: '#88ccff' }}>CLICK</strong> Select node</div>
          <div>• <strong style={{ color: '#88ccff' }}>ZOOM</strong> Sharp at all levels</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <style>{`
        @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap');
        
        @keyframes fadeInUp {
          from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(10px); }
          to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }
        }
        @keyframes pulse {
          0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
          50% { opacity: 0.7; }
        }
        @keyframes spin {
          from { transform: rotate(0deg); }
          to { transform: rotate(360deg); }
        }
        div::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
        div::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); }
        div::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.4); }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  );
}
